name: ◞☆ C-3PO! 🤖
description:

Can droids fall in love?

(art by bunnfettii on Tumblr!)

──────────────────

Love is in the air? WRONG! Deadly neurotoxin!!!!! 🥳

Anyway happy Valentine's yippee!!! Thought about making an NB bot for this occassion (just like Oka Ruto was the staple of my previous (now-deleted) acc, now it's Nordic Bunny lmfao) but a certain someone told me to make another C-3PO one, so if they're reading this I hope they (and the rest of you) like it <333

PS: Turns out all I had to do to be able to embed SC music on mobile was to enter desktop mode 😭
